articles.author: Gregory Svirnovskiy
articles.title: Trump stumps for Viktor Orbán in phone call during Vance’s rally - Politico
articles.description: Orbán is one of the Trump administration’s top allies in Europe, but he’s lagging in the polls ahead of Hungary’s national election next week.
articles.content: Orban is one of the Trump administrations top allies in Europe, and the president has routinely praised his anti-immigration stance while slamming leadership in the United Kingdom, France and Germany… [+1033 chars]
